claimsVerified: view×default = Model A(2026-07-16 round16):保留 base px-[var(--field-px)] py-2,只 bg-transparent border-transparent(code L83-89)— field-controls.spec.md:75『view×default 不可 collapse 成 !py-0』與新 code 一致
readonly×naked / disabled×naked 死格已刪(code L137-138 註明鏡射 field-wrapper + 全庫 0 消費)
readonly×default = bg-readonly + border-transparent + focus-visible ring(WCAG 2.4.7,2026-07-13)= spec Readonly 特例 + anatomy ColorMatrix readonly row 一致
disabled = bg-disabled + text-fg-disabled + placeholder fg-disabled + cursor-not-allowed = spec/anatomy 一致
edit×default = bg-surface border-border hover:border-border-hover + focus-within:!border-primary;error = border-error(+hover/focus)= anatomy ColorMatrix edit/focus/error rows 一致
px-[var(--field-px)] = 12px(uiSize.css:30)+ py-2 8px = docblock『Padding 規則』宣稱值正確
size 只控字體 sm/md text-body / lg text-body-lg,rows 預設 3、resize-y、naked !resize-none !h-full = spec Size/Rows 段一致
view/readonly-empty 走 display <div>(whitespace-pre-wrap break-words)顯 '-';readonly 有值走 native <textarea readOnly>(選取/複製)= spec + field-controls.spec.md:350 兩派統一一致
useControllable resolved SSOT + form.reset() bridge + merge refs = field-controls.spec.md:350 2026-07-14 補註完全對應
naked edit = !px/py-[--table-cell-*] + border + !leading-[1.5];view×naked = !px-0 !py-0 !h-full(intentional divergence documented)= code 一致
aria-invalid / aria-required / aria-describedby / aria-errormessage / data-field-mode 接線 = spec A11y 一致
anatomy story 結構 Overview/Inspector/SizeMatrix/ModeMatrix/ColorMatrix/RowsResizeMatrix/Accessibility = spec 宣稱完全對應
textareaMeta tokens bg-disabled/bg-readonly/bg-surface + states 集合 = cva 真實消費一致

falseClaims.reality: readonly×naked compound 已於 2026-07-16 round16 移除(textarea.tsx:137-138 死格註記;DataTable cell 廢 disabled 態 + readonly 從不入 naked,全庫 0 消費)。cva 已無此格 — 若真傳 readonly+naked 只會拿 base px/py + 無 chrome,與宣稱的『透明 + !px-0 !py-0』不符。spec 引用不存在的 compoundVariants = FALSE_CLAIM(死格殘留宣稱)

falseClaims.claim: 『edit / display / readonly / disabled 四態』『display 渲染 <div> + white-space:pre-wrap』
falseClaims.reality: FieldMode 值為 'view' 非 'display'(cva mode key = view,code 判 isView);docblock 用舊名 display = mode='view' 更名殘留(與 Switch SW-1 同型)

falseClaims.location: textarea.anatomy.stories.tsx:37(Props 表 mode 說明)+ :129(ModeMatrix H3『display — 純展示』)
falseClaims.claim: 說明文字以『display』稱呼純展示模式
falseClaims.reality: type 欄與 story code 正確用 'view'(mode="view");標籤文字 display 舊名殘留,讀者無法以 mode="display" 重現

falseClaims.claim: 『display / readonly 態 value 為空…渲染半形 `-` + text-foreground(disabled → fg-disabled)』
falseClaims.reality: disabled 模式從不進 display-span 分支(showDisplaySpan = isView || readonly-empty,code L221),fieldEmptyColorClass 只會收到 view/readonly → 恆 text-foreground;『disabled → fg-disabled』在 Textarea 的空值渲染路徑 unreachable(disabled 空值走 native textarea + placeholder)
